product_name: Kreamer Tinned-Steel Covered Pail — Size 50 (Antique, Bail Handle & Lid)
attributes: Kreamer (Brooklyn, NY tinware) • Tapered tinned/japanned steel covered pail • Hinged flat lid with folding swing-handle • Side wire bail handle • Size '50' stamped on lid • Oval 'KREAMER' maker's mark on the bottom • Heavy honest patina
price_status: preliminary — pending firm eBay sold-comps pull
condition: Antique — honest as-found; heavy patina, surface rust/oxidation, scratches; complete with lid + bail handle
condition_notes: Antique Kreamer tinned/japanned-steel covered pail, size '50'. Tapered cylindrical body (wider at the lidded top, tapering to a narrower base) with a hinged flat lid carrying a folding swing-handle, plus a side wire bail handle. Maker confirmed: an oval 'KREAMER' cartouche stamped into the bottom (reads in reverse from the inside because it was struck from the outside underside; faintly legible right-reading on the rusty exterior bottom), with a '50' size stamp on the lid. Condition is honest as-found / primitive: the dark japanned/tinned finish is worn with heavy patina, surface rust and oxidation, and scratches throughout; the interior tinned surface is scratched and lightly rusted. Lid present and seats; hinge and bail handle intact. No major dents observed in the supplied photos. Sold as an antique storage/decor piece. Kreamer operated in Brooklyn, NY until c.1940.

ebay.note: Collector/decor tinware; ships or local pickup.

identity.maker_basis: oval 'KREAMER' bottom stamp (reverse-reads inside) + '50' size stamp on lid; form matches documented Kreamer numbered tin pails

estimates._note: Refine-as-we-learn. Tighten each field as evidence arrives; keep the basis + confidence with every value. est=true means inferred, not measured/proven.

circa.basis: Kreamer operated Brooklyn NY ~1890s–1940; tapered japanned tin covered-pail form with bail handle + numbered size is consistent with early-to-mid Kreamer production. No patent date or datable catalog match yet.
circa.refine_with: a dated Kreamer catalog/ad showing the size-50 pail, any patent date, decal/label style, or a serial/date code

dimensions_in.basis: scaled from photos against ~5.5in deck boards and hand/foot references — NO tape measurement provided
dimensions_in.refine_with: a tape-measure shot (height + top & base diameter)

weight_lb.basis: typical mass of a tinned/japanned-steel covered pail of this size with lid + bail handle

refinement_log.note: Initial estimates from intake photos; maker confirmed (KREAMER + 50). Dims/weight inferred, not measured.

photos.photo_gaps: Have: upright full profile (hero), two more profiles, lid top, lid-fit, two interiors, interior oval KREAMER mark, '50' lid stamp/cartouche, exterior mark, outside bottom. Still useful: a tape-measure scale shot; a cleaner right-reading shot of the exterior bottom KREAMER stamp; any base/foot detail.

shipping.notes: Metal pail; sturdy but bulky — box with the lid secured. All dims/weight are estimates pending a tape measure + scale.
